name: http_health_check
description: HTTP and process-level health checks for a running web service.

steps.name: http_endpoint
steps.command: curl -sf --max-time 5 http://localhost:8080/health && echo 'HTTP OK' || echo 'HTTP FAIL'

steps.name: open_ports
steps.description: Check that the service port is bound

steps.name: recent_errors
steps.command: journalctl -u myapp --since '5 minutes ago' --no-pager -p err | tail -20
